Clear Circle Waterproof Roll Labels

Premium BOPP Material for Food, Beverage & Product Packaging

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size Selection Quantity Selection Design Method Selection Template Design Options File Upload Options Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Premium Clear Circle Waterproof Roll Labels

Looking for labels that provide durability while having a sleek see-through look? Our clear circle waterproof roll labels are the perfect solution for your packaging needs. Made from high-quality BOPP material, these transparent labels offer excellent resistance to moisture, oils, and chemicals while maintaining crystal-clear visibility. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

These versatile clear circle waterproof roll labels are ideal for labeling food products, beverages, cosmetics, and jarred product packaging. The waterproof construction ensures your labels maintain their professional appearance even in challenging environments, while the transparent design allows your product to shine through with minimal visual interference.

Available in sizes ranging from 1" to 4" diameter, our custom waterproof roll labels provide the perfect combination of durability and aesthetic appeal for your brand.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Clear Circle Waterproof Roll Labels Order Process

Our streamlined ordering process makes it easy to get your custom clear circle waterproof roll labels exactly as you need them. You can design your labels using our online designer or upload your own print-ready artwork files.

Design Process

With our easy-to-use online designer, you can quickly create your custom roll labels by uploading an image or logo from your computer, or choose from our extensive selection of clipart. For the highest quality results, we recommend uploading vector artwork in .eps format to ensure your clear circle waterproof roll labels maintain crisp details at any size.

Once you've completed your design and added your product to the cart, you'll select your preferred shipping method. A digital proof will then be emailed to you for review and approval before production begins.

Payment

All orders must be paid in full prior to production. We accept VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your roll labels enter production.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your order for clear circle waterproof roll labels, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This system allows you to monitor your labels through every stage of our production process, from order placement to delivery. Simply click the link in your email to get real-time updates from our dynamic tracking system.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Clear Circle Waterproof Roll Labels Production & Turnaround Times

Standard production time for our clear circle waterproof roll labels is 8 business days from the time your artwork is approved and payment is processed. Production turnaround begins when your file upload is complete and all artwork specifications are met.

Standard 8 Business Day Production

Our standard production timeline ensures careful attention to quality control and precise printing of your clear circle waterproof roll labels. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.

Emergency Rush Production

Same-day rush production may be available in certain cases for urgent orders. Please contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5250 to discuss rush options and availability for your clear circle waterproof roll labels.

Important note: Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time. If an order requires revision in our prepress department or if you request a proof for approval, the production timeline restarts from the time final approval is given.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Clear Circle Waterproof Roll Labels Cut Options

Our clear circle waterproof roll labels are precision-cut to ensure clean, professional edges and consistent circular shapes. The cutting process is specifically designed for roll label applications and waterproof BOPP material.

Circle Die-Cut Clear Labels

Each clear circle waterproof roll label is die-cut to precise circular dimensions, ranging from 1" to 4" in diameter. The die-cutting process ensures clean edges that won't lift or peel, even in wet conditions. Labels are provided on easy-release liner material for efficient application.

Roll Format Advantages

Roll format delivery makes application faster and more efficient for high-volume labeling operations. The consistent spacing and alignment of clear circle waterproof roll labels reduces application time while ensuring uniform placement on your products.

All cut lines must be clearly indicated in your artwork files to ensure proper cutting dimensions for your clear circle waterproof roll labels.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Clear Circle Waterproof Roll Labels Artwork Requirements

Proper artwork preparation ensures the best possible results for your clear circle waterproof roll labels. Follow these guidelines to achieve optimal print quality and color accuracy on transparent BOPP material.

Preferred File Types

Vector artwork is required for clear circle waterproof roll labels: EPS, AI, and PDF formats provide the best results. These file types maintain sharp edges and crisp details at any size. When submitting vector files, convert all fonts to outlines or curves to ensure accurate font reproduction.

Additional File Formats

If vector artwork is not available, high-resolution raster files are acceptable with proper specifications: - 100% scale at 100 dpi minimum - 50% scale at 200 dpi or higher - 25% scale at 300 dpi or higher - 10% scale at 600-1200 dpi recommended

File Setup Guidelines

Set up artwork proportionate to your exact clear circle waterproof roll label size. Clearly indicate cut lines for proper die-cutting. Allow for bleed only if necessary, and never flatten or merge layers in PSD files. Remember that transparent areas in your design will show the underlying product or packaging.

Design Services

If you need artwork creation or vectorization services, our design team can recreate most logos or images starting at $15. More detailed images may require custom quoting. This service must be paid in advance, and we'll keep your recreated artwork on file for future orders of custom clear roll labels.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Clear Circle Waterproof Roll Labels Shipping Information

Your clear circle waterproof roll labels will typically arrive within 2-4 business days after production is complete to 90% of the United States. All shipping times are in addition to the 8-day production period.

Shipping Methods

Unless otherwise specified, your roll labels ship via UPS Ground. Available shipping options include: - Economy (5-15 days) - Standard UPS Ground (3-5 business days) - UPS Three Day (3 business days) - UPS Two Day (2 business days) - UPS Overnight (1 business day)

Shipping Time Expectations

Shipping time is separate from production time. Once your clear circle waterproof roll labels complete production, you'll receive a tracking number via email. Most orders reach their destination within the standard timeframe, though remote locations may require additional delivery time.

Important Shipping Notes

For economy shipping, include complete postal information in the "Address Two" field during checkout to ensure proper delivery. Economy shipping may add 5-10 additional days depending on destination. International shipments require customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation from USPS or UPS carriers only.

For questions about shipping rates or expedited delivery for your clear circle waterproof roll labels, contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5250 before placing your order.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Clear Circle Waterproof Roll Labels Installation Guide

Proper installation of your clear circle waterproof roll labels ensures maximum adhesion, longevity, and professional appearance. Follow these steps for optimal results on various surfaces.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the application surface thoroughly with isopropyl alcohol or degreasing agent to remove dirt, oils, and residue. Allow the surface to dry completely before applying your clear circle waterproof roll labels. Ensure the surface temperature is between 50-90°F for optimal adhesion.

Applying Clear Circle Waterproof Roll Labels

Peel each label from the roll liner and position carefully on the cleaned surface. Apply firm, even pressure from the center outward to eliminate air bubbles. The waterproof adhesive bonds immediately, so position accurately on first application. Use a squeegee or smooth tool for larger labels to ensure complete contact.

Final Installation Steps

After application, allow 24-48 hours for the adhesive to fully cure before exposing your clear circle waterproof roll labels to moisture or cleaning chemicals. This curing period ensures maximum bond strength and waterproof performance.

For best results on curved surfaces like bottles and jars, apply labels at room temperature and allow extra time for the material to conform to the surface contours. The BOPP material will adapt to slight curves while maintaining its waterproof properties.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Clear Circle Waterproof Roll Labels?

Clear circle waterproof roll labels are transparent adhesive labels made from BOPP (Biaxially Oriented Polypropylene) material, cut into precise circular shapes and provided on convenient roll format for efficient application. These labels offer complete waterproof protection while maintaining transparency that allows underlying product details to show through clearly. Common uses include food and beverage labeling, cosmetic product identification, and pharmaceutical packaging where moisture resistance and professional appearance are essential.

Order Your Custom Clear Circle Waterproof Roll Labels Today

Ready to enhance your product packaging with professional-grade transparent labeling? Our clear circle waterproof roll labels provide the perfect combination of durability, clarity, and moisture resistance for demanding applications. With sizes from 1" to 4" in diameter and our proven 8-day production timeline, you can achieve the polished look your products deserve.

Start designing your custom clear circle waterproof roll labels using our online design tool, or upload your print-ready artwork to get started. Need samples or have questions about specifications? Our experienced customer service team is ready to help you select the perfect labeling solution for your specific needs.

Choose the transparent advantage that lets your products shine through while providing the protection they need. Design your custom hard hat stickers or explore our complete range of waterproof labeling solutions today.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Clear Circle Waterproof Roll Labels FAQs

What surfaces work best for clear circle waterproof roll labels?

Clear circle waterproof roll labels adhere best to clean, smooth surfaces like glass, plastic, metal, and coated cardboard. The BOPP material and waterproof adhesive perform excellently on bottles, jars, containers, and packaging that may be exposed to moisture or refrigeration.

How long do clear circle waterproof roll labels last outdoors?

Clear circle waterproof roll labels typically last 2-3 years outdoors when applied to clean surfaces. The BOPP material resists UV fading, moisture, and temperature fluctuations, making these labels suitable for products stored in various environmental conditions.

What file format should I use for clear circle waterproof roll labels?

Vector artwork in EPS, AI, or PDF format provides the best results for clear circle waterproof roll labels. These formats ensure crisp edges and accurate colors on transparent material. If using raster images, provide files at 300 dpi or higher at actual size.

Can clear circle waterproof roll labels be removed without residue?

Clear circle waterproof roll labels use permanent adhesive designed for long-term application. While they can be removed with heat and adhesive remover, they are not intended for repositioning. Consider removable adhesive options if temporary application is needed.

Are clear circle waterproof roll labels food safe?

Yes, our clear circle waterproof roll labels meet FDA requirements for indirect food contact applications. The BOPP material and adhesive are safe for food packaging labeling, including refrigerated and frozen products where moisture resistance is critical.

What is the minimum order quantity for clear circle waterproof roll labels?

Our clear circle waterproof roll labels have flexible minimum quantities depending on size and customization requirements. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5250 for specific quantity options and pricing for your labeling project.

Do clear circle waterproof roll labels work in freezer conditions?

Yes, clear circle waterproof roll labels maintain adhesion and clarity in freezer temperatures down to -10°F. The BOPP material remains flexible and the waterproof adhesive continues to bond effectively, making these labels ideal for frozen food packaging and cold storage applications.
